text.title: Scope Creep Parking Lot Protocol Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the scope-creep-parking-lot-protocol methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Demo on 2026-05-21 captures 4 client asks → next morning all 4 triaged → 1 classified scope_change opens CR-0042 → all 4 receive 48h responses; weekly rollup clean.

section.title: Resulting artefact
